title: Z2-9 Hover Vid-Cam droid
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Z2-9 Hover Vid-Cam droid''' was a [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] [[Cam droid/Legends|cam droid]] designed for use by investigative reporters and [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] [[Journalist/Legends|journalists]]. [[Becca Westone]], a reporter for [[Imperial HoloVision]], made us of a Z2-9 Hover Vid-Cam droid.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-12-11 -->''[[Heroes & Rogues]]''
